overall.description: A first-person walk through a dark rural village at night, illuminated by warm artificial light. The camera moves along a stone building past a wooden platform structure where stationary figures are visible, rendered in a low-polygon game engine style with atmospheric lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the stone building wall, approaching a wooden platform structure ahead

notable_agents.action: white figure standing motionless near the building entrance
red figure sitting stationary on the wooden platform

entered.detail: tall stone or plaster building wall with rough texture
elevated wooden platform with support posts and ramp
narrow dirt trail running between grass patches
wooden fence structure attached to the building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a narrow village path at night, passing close to a stone building wall on the left. Ahead on the right, a wooden platform structure becomes increasingly visible. Two stationary figures are present: a white figure near the building and a red figure seated on the platform, illuminated by warm artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with scattered structures

events.description: moving past the wooden platform into more open village area

agents.ego_description: passing the wooden platform and continuing into the open village area beyond

entered.detail: dark silhouette of a house with pointed roof in the background
wooden cart or wagon structure sitting in the open area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the wooden platform into a more open village square. The stone building recedes behind on the left while the platform moves to the right background. A distant house and wooden cart become visible ahead as the path opens up into a wider grassy area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark rural village that transitions from a narrow corridor into an open square. It begins by gliding along a stone building wall on the left, moving toward a wooden platform where a white figure and a seated red figure are illuminated by warm artificial light. As the camera passes the platform, the stone wall recedes and the space expands into a wider village square. The scene then opens up into a grassy area, revealing a distant house and a wooden cart ahead as the path broadens.
